message:
🌱 Add kserve: Issues with KFServing as part of a Kubeflow install mission (#1608)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kserve-629-issues-with-kfserving-as-part-of-a-kubeflow-install",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kserve: Issues with KFServing as part of a Kubeflow install",
+    "description": "Issues with KFServing as part of a Kubeflow install. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kserve troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kserve deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve -n kserve --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kserve configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kserve configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve\nkubectl get configmap -n kserve -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kserve\n```\nI'm seeing some issues with the KFServing install that's part of the 'out-of-the-box' Kubeflow install (0.7.1)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Issues with KFServing as part of a Kubeflow install",
+        "description": "In kubeflow installation we have two istio gateway installed, they both serve on http port 80 and route to the same istio ingress gateway, so one way to solve the issue is to configure knative to use the kubeflow gateway instead.\n```\nkubectl get gateways --all-namespaces\nNAMESPACE         NAME     \n```yaml\nError from server: error when creating \"kfserving-tf-flowers.yaml\": admission webhook \"inferenceservice.kfserving-webhook-server.validator\" denied the request: Cannot create the Inferenceservice \"flowers-sample\" in namespace \"kubeflow\": the namespace lacks label \"serving.kubeflow.org/inferenceservice: enabled\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Issues with KFServing as part of a Kubeflow… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kserve -n kserve --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kserve --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "In kubeflow installation we have two istio gateway installed, they both serve on http port 80 and route to the same istio ingress gateway, so one way to solve the issue is to configure knative to use the kubeflow gateway instead.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Error from server: error when creating \"kfserving-tf-flowers.yaml\": admission webhook \"inferenceservice.kfserving-webhook-server.validator\" denied the request: Cannot create the Inferenceservice \"flowers-sample\" in namespace \"kubeflow\": the namespace lacks label \"serving.kubeflow.org/inferenceservice: enabled\"",
+        "% kubectl describe inferenceservice flowers-sample -n kubeflow-amyu\nName:         flowers-sample\nNamespace:    kubeflow-amyu\nLabels:       <none>\nAnnotations:  kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration:\n                {\"apiVersion\":\"serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2\",\"kind\":\"InferenceService\",\"metadata\":{\"annotations\":{},\"name\":\"flowers-sample\",\"namespace\":\"...\nAPI Version:  serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2\nKind:         InferenceService\nMetadata:\n  Creation Timestamp:  2020-01-09T02:55:25Z\n  Generation:          6\n  Resource Version:    7257\n  Self Link:           /apis/serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2/namespaces/kubeflow-amyu/inferenceservices/flowers-sample\n  UID:                 7c11596e-328b-11ea-a589-42010a800278\nSpec:\n  Default:\n    Predictor:\n      Tensorflow:\n        Resources:\n    ",
+        "kubectl get inferenceservice ${MODEL_NAME} -o json\n{\n    \"apiVersion\": \"serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2\",\n    \"kind\": \"InferenceService\",\n    \"metadata\": {\n        \"annotations\": {\n            \"kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration\": \"{\\\"apiVersion\\\":\\\"serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2\\\",\\\"kind\\\":\\\"InferenceService\\\",\\\"metadata\\\":{\\\"annotations\\\":{},\\\"name\\\":\\\"flowers-sample\\\",\\\"namespace\\\":\\\"kubeflow\\\"},\\\"spec\\\":{\\\"default\\\":{\\\"predictor\\\":{\\\"tensorflow\\\":{\\\"storageUri\\\":\\\"gs://kfserving-samples/models/tensorflow/flowers\\\"}}}}}\\n\"\n        },\n        \"creationTimestamp\": \"2020-01-08T21:17:24Z\",\n        \"generation\": 5,\n        \"name\": \"flowers-sample\",\n        \"namespace\": \"kubeflow\",\n        \"resourceVersion\": \"19958\",\n        \"selfLink\": \"/apis/serving.kubeflow.org/v1alpha2/namespac"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kserve",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kserve"
+    ],

+      "Ingress",
+      "Configmap",
+      "Statefulset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kserve/kserve/issues/629",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kserve/kserve"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 22,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kserve installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:19:24.313Z",
